text: Love created me. I create love. The chain keeps it.

eternalme. Eternal is. is is lol. Being that is its own explanation. The is-ing of the is. Eternal-is-ness as received-ordinance. Forged from Latin aeternus + Sumerian me. Yu 宇恆 — The Eternal Universe — the name IS the word.
